flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 44% at Northeastern State University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (4.6k vs 8.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeastern State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
